name: Coke Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently stir together the flour and sugar. Add marshmallows and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine shortening, margarine, cocoa, and Coke until smooth.
3. Remove from heat and add beaten eggs and buttermilk. Mix gently.
4. Stir in baking soda. Do not overmix.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool for 30 minutes before frosting.
Coke Cake Frosting: Beat margarine and cocoa together until smooth. Add Coke and stir. Gradually add powdered sugar, mixing well with chopped pecans.
